Project.Name: Resume Analyzer - Full Stack Web Application

Task.Name: 1.1.3 Create SQLModel User model with subscription_tier field
1.2.4 Implement password hashing utilities with bcrypt
1.2.5 Create helper functions for token operations
1.3.4 Add email format validation and uniqueness check
1.3.5 Create token refresh logic with refresh token rotation
1.4.5 Create method to link OAuth2 account to existing user
1.4.6 Store OAuth2 tokens securely in database
1.5.9 Add OAuth2 error handling and validation
1.5.10 Implement rate limiting for auth endpoints
1.6.3 Create dependency injection for protected routes
1.8.6 Create methods for resume CRUD operations
1.9.2 Initialize OpenAI client with API key
1.9.5 Implement response parsing and error handling
1.13.4 Implement input validation for all endpoints
1.14.3 Create resume endpoint and service tests
1.16.2 Configure FastAPI app, middleware stack, router registration
2.1.3 Configure Tailwind CSS with dark mode
2.1.5 Setup Vite config with API proxy
3.1.1 Configure frontend API client to connect to backend
3.1.2 Test all API calls from frontend
3.1.3 Verify JWT token generation and storage
3.3.3 Test API calls without JWT token
3.3.6-8 Test network, API failures, duplicate email
3.4.5-6 Test page load and response times
3.5.3-4 Verify password hashing and OAuth2 secrets
3.5.5-6 Test SQL injection and rate limiting
3.6.4-6 Create architecture docs, schema docs, deployment guide
3.7.5-6 Setup env variables and create deployment checklist
